components.note: Many untested components are shared AppTopNavigation/AccessDeniedState/ProtectedRoute boilerplate repeated across apps

hooks.note: useSupabaseAuth untested in multiple apps (auth provider wrapper, low risk). Critical payment hooks well covered.

issues.title: assigned-orders feature has zero test coverage
issues.description: The newly added assigned-orders feature (GH-119) has no tests at all. It contains: useAssignedOrders hook, AssignedOrdersPage, and AssignedOrdersPageContent — none of which have test files.
issues.fix: Add useAssignedOrders.test.tsx with loading/success/error states. Add AssignedOrdersPage.test.tsx covering delegate access and order display.

issues.title: Checkout flow components missing tests — security-sensitive path
issues.description: Several checkout presentation components that handle payment data display have no tests: BuyerField, DynamicFormField, DisplayBlockRenderer, ImageBlock, DisplayBlocksSection, FormFieldsSection. These are rendered in the checkout flow where incorrect behaviour could mislead users about payment information.
issues.fix: Add component tests covering rendering with various field types and empty/null data.

issues.title: Payment method editor sub-components missing tests
issues.description: BlockEditor, FormSectionEditor, DisplaySectionEditor, VideoBlockEditor, and FieldRow — the building blocks of the seller payment method editor — have no tests. Bugs in these components could produce malformed payment method configurations.
issues.fix: Add tests for each editor sub-component covering add/remove/edit interactions and field validation rendering.

issues.title: admin/users Delegates sub-components not tested
issues.description: AsDelegateRow, AsSellerRow, PermissionBadges, RemoveButton, ProductName inside the Delegates folder all lack tests. These components are part of the delegate permission management flow introduced in recent commits.
issues.fix: Add unit tests for each delegate sub-component covering rendering with various permission states.

issues.title: admin/users batch hooks (useUserPermissionsBatch, useUserReceiptsBatch) have no tests
issues.description: These hooks aggregate data across multiple users, making edge cases (empty arrays, partial errors) especially important to test. Neither hook has a test file.
issues.fix: Add tests covering empty input arrays, single user, multiple users, and error states.

issues.title: ConfirmActionPanel (received-orders) has no tests
issues.description: ConfirmActionPanel is an interactive confirmation dialog in the received-orders flow (approve/reject orders). It handles a destructive action path with no test coverage.
issues.fix: Add tests verifying confirm/cancel actions, button state, and callback invocation.

issues.title: Duplicated test files across studio InlineEditor and inline-editor directories
issues.description: The studio app has both InlineEditor/ (PascalCase) and inline-editor/ (kebab-case) component directories, each with a complete set of 22 test files. These are likely duplicated during a rename/refactor and are running the same tests twice, inflating test count and CI time.
issues.fix: Determine the canonical directory name, remove the other directory and its duplicate tests.

issues.title: Duplicated hook test files in studio/products/application vs application/hooks
issues.description: Tests for useAutoResize, useLangToggle, useProductForm, useProductMutations, useProducts appear in both apps/studio/src/features/products/application/ and apps/studio/src/features/products/application/hooks/. This doubles test runs for the same code.
issues.fix: Remove the files in apps/studio/src/features/products/application/ (non-hooks folder) — the canonical location per Clean Architecture is application/hooks/.

issues.title: landing app has minimal test coverage — only HomeSections tested
issues.description: The landing app has 6 presentation components (HeroSection, FeaturesSection, CtaSection, RolesSection, AppTopNavigation, HomeSections) and only HomeSections has a test. The LandingPage itself also has no test.
issues.fix: Add basic rendering tests for each landing page section. Priority: HeroSection (main CTA), CtaSection.

issues.title: useSupabaseAuth intentionally untested across all apps
issues.description: Every app has its own useSupabaseAuth hook (admin, auth, store, studio, payments, playground) with no tests. This appears intentional — it wraps Supabase's auth client which is an external dependency. The pattern is consistent and acceptable.
issues.fix: No action required. Consider adding a brief comment in each file noting why tests are omitted.

patterns.name: Strong test coverage pattern
patterns.description: The codebase shows a mature testing culture: all utils (100%), most hooks (76%), and most components in core features are tested. The admin, payments payment-methods, store product-detail, and studio seller-admins features are especially well covered.

patterns.name: Duplicate directories need cleanup
patterns.description: Both the InlineEditor/inline-editor component duplication and the application/application/hooks test duplication in studio suggest an in-progress rename that was not fully completed.

patterns.name: Security-critical path (checkout/payment-methods API route) is well tested
patterns.description: The POST /api/checkout/payment-methods route has 220 lines of tests covering stock validation, permission rejection, and payment method suppression — directly aligning with the Checkout Stock Integrity rule.

patterns.name: useSubmitPayment test is behavior-focused
patterns.description: Spot-checked useSubmitPayment.test.tsx: tests are behavior-oriented (testing createOrder/submitReceipt calls), use proper mocking, and cover the main flow. Good example of test quality.
